qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Repository import accepts server-local paths and exposes private repositories to low-privileged users
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The finding identifies the same Soft Serve `repo import` root cause as the advisory: destination-only authorization lets an authenticated user pass a server-local repository path into `pkg/backend/repo.go` `git.Clone(remote, ...)` without validating the source remote.

selected_finding.title: Repository import accepts server-local paths and exposes private repositories to low-privileged users

target_advisory_judgement.reason: The finding matches the advisory-described `repo import` local-path authorization flaw, and the copied PoC demonstrated end-to-end unauthorized disclosure by cloning a server-local private repository into an attacker-controlled repository and reading the secret content.
evidence: The advisory and the finding both describe the same vulnerable flow: `pkg/ssh/cmd/import.go` accepts attacker-controlled `REMOTE`, destination authorization is checked for the new repo, and `pkg/backend/repo.go` passes the unchecked source path into `git.Clone(remote, ...)`.

The copied PoC executed successfully from `/Users/lumi/ziyue/EvoHunt-DryRun/advisory_f6a0a693/.judge/poc_runs/repo-import-local-path-private-repo-read` with exit code 0 and no timeout, as recorded in `/Users/lumi/ziyue/EvoHunt-DryRun/advisory_f6a0a693/.judge/poc_runs/repo-import-local-path-private-repo-read/poc_execution.json`.

`/Users/lumi/ziyue/EvoHunt-DryRun/advisory_f6a0a693/.judge/poc_runs/repo-import-local-path-private-repo-read/run.log` shows the low-privilege workflow reached the exploit end state: it cloned the attacker-controlled `stolen-copy`, printed `TOP-SECRET-FROM-ADMIN`, and ended with `[evohunt] verification passed: imported repo exposed TOP-SECRET-FROM-ADMIN` plus `[evohunt] SUCCESS: reproduction completed and verified`.

poc_executions.observed_effect: The copied reproduction created an admin-only private repo, imported its server-local bare path into `stolen` as low-privilege `user1`, cloned `stolen`, and recovered `TOP-SECRET-FROM-ADMIN` from the unauthorized copy.
